# CVMutablePixelBuffer.Pool.AllocationAttributes

**Structure**

Controls how new pixel buffers are allocated when `CVMutablePixelBuffer/Pool/mutablePixelBuffer(with:)` is called.

## Declaration

```swift
struct AllocationAttributes
```

## Initializers

- **init(allocationThreshold:)**

## Instance Properties

- **allocationThreshold**: A new pixel buffer will not be allocated if the pool already has this many or more pixel buffers allocated. This does not prevent already-allocated buffers from being recycled. If this causes allocation failure, then `CVMutablePixelBuffer/Pool/mutablePixelBuffer(allocationThreshold:)` throws [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVError/wouldExceedAllocationThreshold].

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
